ab: amu ka taic’an na kitnga’ ata.
en: Hello everyone. Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.

ab: amun ka taisic’an mahaip pa’ na masnava’ a sinsi’ i pailcicia ki kakaunun tu qalinga.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的布農語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today, I am going to teach you how to say the Bunun language for food.
A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: sinsi’, ni’ cak itqal. maqtu’ asu muqnang tupa?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: ni cak tan’a, pidaining ka qalinga.
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: sadu’a di, sisili zaku muc’an masipul.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
It’s very well read.
Read it again. Please speak louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pen.
B: I forgot to bring my pen.
A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: sinsi’, panpungul cak madas si isqaqaisqais.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: dian simul isqaqaisqais ha’an qaviaz su’.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.
B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Class is over.

ab: pan’iti’ ata haip, na muqnang niciuvi’ pasadu.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
